nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Audio input (channel count must match Faust output count)

nodes.label: MIDI In
nodes.description: MIDI events forwarded to Faust UI zones (if MIDI zones are active)

nodes.label: Faust Code
nodes.description: Faust DSP source code selected via classId property. Compiled via LLVM JIT or interpreter.

nodes.label: Faust Compute
nodes.description: Calls faust::dsp::compute() with copied input buffers. One DSP instance per voice.

nodes.label: Faust Parameters
nodes.description: Dynamic parameters from Faust UI elements (sliders, buttons, nentry). Mapped to zone pointers.

nodes.label: Modulation Outputs
nodes.description: Dynamic modulation outputs from Faust bargraph elements (hbargraph/vbargraph).
